## AbstractModelClass.save() method

Saves the current instance to the database. If the instance is new, it will be inserted; otherwise, it will be replaced.

**Signature:**

```typescript
save(options?: ModelSaveOptions): Promise<any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[ModelSaveOptions](./iodm.modelsaveoptions.md)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the save operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;any&gt;

A promise that resolves with the result of the save operation.

## Exceptions

Will throw an error if validation fails or if there is an issue during the save process.

## Example


```ts
const instance = new UserModel({ name: 'John' });
await instance.save();
```
